reviews.review_description: I wish i could give a negative 1 review because of how horrible this game is. This game is literally just a worser gorilla tag copy with p2w mods, a kick hammer, ban hammer, mod menus, AND a owner title, having spoiled brats doing moderation for you instead of hiring some is mad stupid. This game also lacks in originality as literally the only things original are the textures and ropes, and even then those are horrible too. Its quite obvious this game is just a cashgrab targetting little gorilla tag kids who will waste their money on this "game" dont play this slop and please, if you do just tell other people to not support this.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for the feedback.

I get that you don’t like the game, and that’s fair, but calling it “slop” doesn’t really help us improve anything. We’re actively working on making the game better, adding more original content, improving moderation, and balancing anything that feels unfair.

The game isn’t meant to be a cash grab. It’s a project we’re continuing to update based on player feedback. If there are specific things you think should be changed, like moderation, paid items, or gameplay balance, we’re open to hearing it.

We appreciate anyone who gives real criticism, even if it’s negative. We’ll keep improving.

reviews.review_description: I love how much time you all spend into making this game Id buy stuff but I cant at least untill mid summer to help yall but anyway, I love this game its really fun and it also is kinda like Scary Baboon and ik some of baboon player will deff like this! I love it! 🔥😁😆🙂

Claims that Monkedev's Lethal Ape is malware and that Monkedev's Lethal Ape will install viruses on your headset and they say not to play it,even though I've played it before and it's actually NOT malware and did NOT install a virus on my headset and has a LOT more work put into it. So This game is false advertising and trying to get players onto their game instead of a better competitors game. And also this game is just a copy of the game Lethal Ape Plus! Also most things in the game cost money and give an unfair advantage to some people. It's just a cash grab...

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.

To clarify, the sign mentioned in our game was intended to distinguish our game from another title using the same name. We understand that some players may have interpreted it differently, and we apologize for any confusion that may have caused.

We respectfully disagree with the claim that our game is a copy or a cash grab. Our team has spent a significant amount of time developing and improving the game, and we continue to add new content and features for players.

As for in-game purchases, they are used to support ongoing development, and we regularly review player feedback regarding balance and fairness.

We appreciate your feedback and thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.

The graphics are pretty good. The players are not so good. The owner literally has it so you can buy a ban AND kick hammer which just ruins the game instead of getting actual staff. You can literally freeze players, making it almost impossible to do anything. Players are insanely toxic. You can't hear anyone, the voice volume isn't that good since I can't hear anyone because of how loud the monsters are. I tried getting the shirt for subscribing to their channel and didn't get it when I subbed on vr, then tried on mobile. Same with the discord hat, I didn't get it.

I personally think that Lethal Ape is a great game. I play it almost every day and never get bored of it, im actually so glad i found this game because otherwise nothing else could've cured my boredom! 
Only thing i dont like about this game is that you can buy those Kick and ban hammers, because there are a lot of.. lets call them "griefers" that abuse the Hammers for absolute no reason and it's soooo irritating.
But nonetheless, it's a great game in my opinion.

Why have things for sale with no information on how to use them ?? 

Bought gun pack gives u no instructions on how to access 😑

developer_response.body:
Hey, sorry for the confusion.

Purchased items like the gun pack can be accessed from the wardrobe/customization area in-game. We’ll work on making the instructions clearer so players know where to find their items after buying them.

Thanks for letting us know.
